text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Wha... what is this?

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Commence! Let the dorm quiz battle begin! I wish
you all the best of luck!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: All right, Miho crew! You better not lose to Ritto!

text_block_list.name: Miho Dormitory Students
text_block_list.text: Let's gooooo!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Ritto Dormitory! We'll be celebrating tonight! So,
let's enjoy this battle of the brains, shall we?

text_block_list.name: Ritto Dormitory Students
text_block_list.text: Yeeeahhh!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Oh, you came, City! Didn't you say you had work?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
We had a schedule change... Anyway, what's all
this commotion?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A few hours earlier...

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: It is clear! Races are at times a battle of wits!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Hence, we want to provide an opportunity to test
your thinking under pressure. I present to you... a
quiz competition!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Your teams are arranged by dorm! Work together
for a chance to win the grand prize we've
prepared! Get ready! Let's go go go!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
City, you're competing with us on the Ritto Dorm
team. There'll be a buzzer quiz and a scatter
quiz.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Do you know what a scatter quiz is? Envelopes
containing questions are scattered about, which
we find and bring back to the host to answer.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
And the dorm with the highest overall score wins.
Simple, right? I'm confident you'll be a great
contributor, City!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Are you now? ...Well, I don't really have a
preference, so Trainer, which should I join?
choice_data_list: Test your speed in the buzzer quiz.
Test your resolve in the scatter quiz.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: A test of speed, huh. Sounds simple enough.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Question! What is defined as zero degrees, zero
minutes, and zero seconds longitude?! A: the
prime meridian, or B: the date line?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Ding!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: The answer is B for Bakushin!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Bzzzt!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Wrong! The correct answer is A: the prime
meridian!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: What?! My Bakushin intuition was off?!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
That was close... I have to hit the button faster
next time...

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Next question! Finish the sentence! "Eating
persimmons—"

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Ding!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I know! "Makes you want to eat pears and
chestnuts too!"

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Bzzzt!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Urgh! Wrong again! But oh well—there's still more
chances! Yes, I still have a chance!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
As class representative, I will be the first to hit
the buzzer each time! Eheh!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Be first... every time...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: ...Huh.
choice_data_list:
(Something seems different about City all of a
sudden.)

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: Now, next question! The oldest U—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Ding!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Turkmenistan.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Ding ding ding!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
How?! You didn't even finish listening to the
entire question!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Wait... Are you psychic, City?!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
No, it just so happens the same question was
asked on a quiz show this model I know was on.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
If my opponent is fast, I have to be faster. It's
time to catch up.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Go, go, Ritto Dormitory! What a riveting
comeback!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Your strength and determination never changes. I
love it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold City's staggering comeback helps her
dormitory win the competition!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
The scatter quiz... Well, a little moving around
would be nice.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We head over to the beach where the game will
take place. There, a helicopter flying overhead
scatters a huge number of envelopes containing
the questions!

text_block_list.name: Staff
text_block_list.text: Start!

text_block_list.name: Event Commentator
text_block_list.text:
And they're off to a clean start, making a beeline
for the envelopes!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Okay, that envelope is gonna be mine—

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Wait, what?!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Outta my way! Speed demon comin' through!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Oh no—she beat me to it!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
What're ya doin', City? Get outta da way if you're
not gonna run!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: D-damn it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The participants begin heading back to the quiz
master, kicking up trails of dust in their wake.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Once there, they open up the envelopes and take
a crack at the questions written inside.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: What do you mean "blank"?!

text_block_list.name: Quiz Master
text_block_list.text:
It looks like you brought an envelope with no
question inside! You'll have to run for another
one!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Are you—

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Urgh... I know!

text_block_list.name: Event Commentator
text_block_list.text:
Currently, Miho Dormitory is in the lead! Will
Ritto Dormitory make a comeback?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: All right, let's keep this lead, everyone!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Not if I have anything to say about it!

text_block_list.name: Quiz Master
text_block_list.text: Sorry! This one is also empty!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: One more try!

text_block_list.name: Ritto Dorm Resident
text_block_list.text: City's all sweaty and covered in sand...

text_block_list.name: Quiz Master
text_block_list.text: Well done! Five points to Ritto Dormitory!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: All right! Now for another!

text_block_list.name: Miho Dorm Resident
text_block_list.text:
Even with all the sweat and sand, she's still so
beautiful!

text_block_list.name: Event Commentator
text_block_list.text:
What a surprise! Listen to the cheers for Gold
City coming from both sides!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Well, isn't that a slick move? Captivatin' the
crowd with your determination.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
She's quick on her feet, but we better not
underestimate her willpower either!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold City's inspiring efforts invigorate the quiz
participants, ultimately leading her dorm's team
to victory.
